summary: Renamed 3 references in EmergencyCardView.tsx: comment text 'Special Instructions' -> 'Owner's Notes', conditional pet.special_instructions -> pet.owners_notes, display value pet.special_instructions -> pet.owners_notes, and label text 'Special Instructions' -> 'Owner's Notes'. Yellow callout styling (background, border, icon, uppercase, letterSpacing, color) left entirely unchanged.
notes_for_reviewer: TypeScript compilation produced 4 errors, all in EditPetModal.tsx (lines 28, 206, 207) — these are pre-existing and belong to a separate task covering that component. No new errors were introduced by this change.
The label text uses a typographic apostrophe in "Owner's Notes" matching the existing comment style; if the style guide requires a straight apostrophe, update line 214 accordingly.
